description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Universal-Updater that runs on push to all branches except translation and on pull requests to any branch, except when README.md changes. The workflow also triggers on release published and workflow dispatch events. Use a concurrency group named ci-${{ startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/pull') && github.ref || 'publish' }}. The workflow consists of a build job that uses a devkitARM container on an ubuntu-latest runner to build Universal-Updater, and two dependent jobs to publish the build to GitHub releases and to Universal-Team/extras, and to send success or failure webhooks.
